omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Note that you do not need to create a user account to use the Services. If you do not create a user account and use our Services, we will still collect personal information like journey data, destinations and preferences, as described in this Privacy Notice, including Location Information. The data will be linked to a unique ID randomly generated by Citymapper each time you install the Citymapper App, as further detailed under the "Device Information & Online Identifiers" below. This helps us keep track of your previous journey planning searches and enables us to find the best route for you. Note that if you do not create a user account, you may not be able to take advantage of certain features offered in the Services.

omitted_declarations.data_type: Other User generated content(for example, user bios, notes, or open-ended responses)
omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Contact Information and Contact Communications: Whenever you contact us (for example, through online contact forms available through the Citymapper's websites, by seeking customer support, providing feedback, responding to one of our messages or survey requests, by signing up to our Newsletter, etc.), we will collect any information you provide, which may include the content of your messages to us and any attachments, and depending on the communication, your name, and contact information such as email address or telephone number, organization and title, country or mailing address (if you contact us on behalf of an actual or potential Enterprise Customer). We will also collect information which is apparent from your communication (for example, the email address or phone number from which you contacted us) and our communications and correspondence. If you communicate with us by telephone or other audio or video communication platforms, we may record the audio or video of our communications, create transcripts, and retain the recordings or transcripts consistent with applicable law. In certain instances, we may provide you an opportunity to indicate your preferences for our future communications, and we will collect any preferences you indicate.

omitted_declarations.data_type: Other actions(Any other user activity or actions in-app not listed here such as gameplay, likes, and dialog options.)
omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Usage Information: We collect information about how you interact with our Services. Like most providers of online services and platforms, we automatically collect information about the electronic path you take to our Services, through our Services and when exiting our Services, and your usage and activity on our Services, and may but is not limited to, log data, information about when and how you downloaded the Citymapper Apps or created your User Account; your access and login activity; your preferences; details about any transportation or delivery services you request or participate in through our Services; your transactions; the specific components of the Citymapper Apps, websites, platforms or any other aspect of our Services you visit or use, along with details about your views or use of these components and actions made, such as the links, objects, features, settings, products and benefits you view, click, or otherwise interact with as well as the duration and time and date stamp and URLs which directed you to our Citymapper websites; any alerts or communications we send you in connection with your use of our Services and your interactions with such communications; and any errors that may have occurred during your use of our Services. This information may be collected and stored by us, or by our third-party service providers and business partners, using cookies, related technologies (such as pixels and web beacons), and third-party analytics tools. For more details, please review our Cookie Notice.

Contact Information and Contact Communications: Whenever you contact us (for example, through online contact forms available through the Citymapper's websites, by seeking customer support, providing feedback, responding to one of our messages or survey requests, by signing up to our Newsletter, etc.), we will collect any information you provide, which may include the content of your messages to us and any attachments, and depending on the communication, your name, and contact information such as email address or telephone number, organization and title, country or mailing address (if you contact us on behalf of an actual or potential Enterprise Customer). We will also collect information which is apparent from your communication (for example, the email address or phone number from which you contacted us) and our communications and correspondence. If you communicate with us by telephone or other audio or video communication platforms, we may record the audio or video of our communications, create transcripts, and retain the recordings or transcripts consistent with applicable law. In certain instances, we may provide you an opportunity to indicate your preferences for our future communications, and we will collect any preferences you indicate.

Saved and Shared Preferences: You may choose to select preferences and provide us with information on your home address, work address, and other saved places to receive personalised journey-planning Services and to expedite your searches. If you enable these in-app permissions, you may also share information with us from other apps, including through your third-party calendar app, so that you can get information about your upcoming events and help you get to them on time.
